title: Oklo’s Federal Approvals Shift Focus Toward Execution Risk And Isotope Revenue
summary: Oklo (NYSE:OKLO) has secured a first-of-its-kind NRC materials license for its Atomic Alchemy subsidiary to process radioisotopes. The U.S. Department of Energy has approved Nuclear Safety Design Agreements for Oklo’s Aurora reactor and Texas Groves Isotopes Test Reactor. Oklo has entered formal agreements with the DOE to advance its reactor pilot projects and commercial isotope production under federal oversight.
